file: 947_Zheng 等 - 2020 - Efficient and stable Ni-Cu catalysts for ex situ catalytic pyrolysis vapor upgrading of oleic acid i.txt

experiments.description: 在固定床反应器中，使用Ni-Cu双金属催化剂（负载于MCM-41等不同载体上），在氮气气氛下对油酸蒸气进行催化热解升级，以生产烃类燃料。研究了催化剂载体、热解温度、催化温度和油酸进料量等参数对转化率和产物选择性的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: ex situ catalytic pyrolysis vapor upgrading of oleic acid under a N2 atmosphere. The effects of catalyst support (AC, Al2O3, ZrO2, HZSM-5, HUSY, Hb and MCM-41), pyrolysis process parameters (pyrolysis temperature, catalytic temperature and amount of oleic acid injected), and the mixing ratio of modified metals (Ni:Cu = 0:1,2,1:1,1:2,1:0) on the catalytic conversion of oleic acid to high-quality chemicals were studied.

Operation mode.value: Fixed-bed reactor, ex situ catalytic pyrolysis vapor upgrading
Operation mode.original: Fixed-bed reactor, ex situ catalytic pyrolysis vapor upgrading

Catalyst stability.original: Stable for at least 3 reaction cycles after regeneration
